title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Arya Marriage Validation Act, 1937. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India except 2[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States] and applies also to citizens of India wherever they may be.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 3) Order, 1956, for "Part B States".
